title: phyllodes brachystachys
intro: Phyllodes brachystachys, also known as the African wormwood or bitter bush, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating digestive issues. Phyllodes brachystachys can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional rituals for its purported spiritual and protective properties.
